title: Rootless connection always set as default when removing a machine
body:
### Issue Description

In Podman Desktop we saw some users complaining about the UI not displaying resources/containers/.... and every time the problem seems to related to the default connection set.

I saw that when deleting a podman machine the remaining machine is set to use a rootless connection when it is not actually correct.


### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create a rootful machine and start it
2. Create another rootful/rootless (it's the same) machine and start it
3. At this point, on Podman Desktop, you will be asked if you want to update the default connection -> yes
4. Stop the latest rootful/rootless machine -> on Podman Desktop you will be asked if you want to update the default connection -> yes -> the rootful connection of the first machine is set to default
5. delete the latest rootful/rootless machine. 
6. if you check again you will see the default connection of the first machine has been updated to the rootless one


### Describe the results you received

The rootless connection is used while i think i'm using the rootful connection. I don't see any existing resource and i think podman is not working.

### Describe the results you expected

I would expect that the rootful connection is used by default for the first machine
